zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Brooke於1527年11月1日出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Sir George Brooke30歲，母親Anne Braye26歲。他於大約1550年與Dorothy Neville在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年3月6日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年69歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Brooke于1527年11月1日出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Sir George Brooke30岁，母亲Anne Braye26岁。他于大约1550年与Dorothy Neville在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年3月6日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年69岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Brooke was born on 1 November 1527, in Kent, England, his father, Sir George Brooke, was 30 and his mother, Anne Braye, was 26. He married Dorothy Neville about 1550, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 6 March 1597, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Brooke est né le 1 novembre 1527, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Brooke, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Braye, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Neville environ 1550, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mars 1597, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Brooke am 1. November 1527 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Brooke 30 und seine Mutter Anne Braye 26. Er hat um 1550 in England Dorothy Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. März 1597 im Alter von 69 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brooke è nato il il 1 novembre 1527 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir George Brooke, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anne Braye, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Neville circa 1550, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1597, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Brookeが1527年11月1日にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir George Brookeは30歳，母Anne Brayeは26歳であった。約1550年にイギリスでDorothy Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1597年3月6日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで69歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Brooke(이)가 1527년 11월 1일 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Brooke(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Braye(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국에서 Dorothy Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 3월 6일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.1 November 1527–6 March 1597: 1 de novembro de 1527–6 de março de 1597
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Brooke nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1527, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Brooke, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Braye, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Neville aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de março de 1597, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Brooke родился 1 ноября 1527 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir George Brooke было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Braye, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Neville около 1550 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 марта 1597 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.1 November 1527–6 March 1597: 1 de noviembre de 1527–6 de marzo de 1597
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Brooke nació el 1 de noviembre de 1527, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Brooke, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Braye, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Dorothy Neville aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1597, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
